name: Mom's Roast Beef
recipeIngredient: RADIS BGMB90B (Eye of the round beef roast)
2.5 pounds Eye of the round beef roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a Dutch oven; brown beef roast on all sides.
2. Add onion and cook until transparent. Stir in coffee, 3/4 cup water, bouillon, basil, rosemary, garlic, salt, and pepper.
3. Cover and simmer for about 2.5 hours or until meat is tender.
4. Combine remaining 1/4 cups water with all purpose flour to form a slurry; stir into pan juices. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly.
5. Remove roast and slice; serve gravy alongside.
